pattern: A sentence is a pangram exactly when the set of its distinct letters reaches all twenty-six, so collecting the unique characters and checking the count suffices.
hints: You only care whether each of the 26 letters shows up, not how often.
Put the characters into a set and compare its size to 26.
Return whether the number of distinct lowercase letters in the sentence equals 26.

edge_inputs.description: short word is not a pangram
all letters present but heavily repeated
